zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerberge de Bourgogne於0967年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o阿爾斯時，她的父親Conrad III de Bourgogne43歲，母親Mathilde de France24歲。她於大約0978年與Hermann I. von Werl結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1015年1月16日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 奧斯包格霍爾高享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

en.lifeSummary: When Gerberge de Bourgogne was born in 0967, in Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, her father, Conrad III de Bourgogne, was 43 and her mother, Mathilde de France, was 24. She married Hermann I. von Werl about 0978. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 16 January 1015, in Horgau, Augsburg, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerberge de Bourgogne est née en 0967, à Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, son père, Conrad III de Bourgogne, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de France, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Hermann I. von Werl environ 0978. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 16 janvier 1015, à Horgau, Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerberge de Bourgogne 0967 in Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Conrad III de Bourgogne 43 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de France 24. Sie hat um 0978 Hermann I. von Werl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 16. Januar 1015 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Horgau, Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Deutschland.

Lei sposato Hermann I. von Werl circa 0978. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 16 gennaio 1015, nel Horgau, Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 48 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Gerberge de Bourgogne(이)가 0967년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 알레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Conrad III de Bourgogne(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de France(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 0978년 Hermann I. von Werl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1015년 1월 16일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 오그스버그 호르가에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerberge de Bourgogne nasceu em 0967, em Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, seu pai, Conrad III de Bourgogne, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de France, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Hermann I. von Werl aproximadamente 0978. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1015, em Horgau, Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Alemanha, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerberge de Bourgogne родилась в 0967 г. в местности арльс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция, её отцу по имени Conrad III de Bourgogne было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de France, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hermann I. von Werl около 0978 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 16 января 1015 г. в местности хаургау, ландкрис аугсбург, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.Schwaben, Kelheim, Landkreis Kelheim, Ba: Schwaben, Kelheim, Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Alemania
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerberge de Bourgogne nació en 0967, en Arles, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, su papá, Conrad III de Bourgogne, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Mathilde de France, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Hermann I. von Werl aproximadamente 0978. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 16 de enero de 1015, en Horgau, Landkreis Augsburg, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 48 años.
